description: Builders that create local model stubs diverge from authoritative foundation models. Mouser builder copied models.py/base.py with wrong field names.
resolution: Specs must explicitly list ALL shared model field names and warn builders NOT to create local copies of shared modules. Foundation must merge first.

content: InvenTree SupplierMixin API requires supplier_slug as first param in get_search_results(supplier_slug, term) and get_import_data(supplier_slug, part_id). get_suppliers returns list[Supplier(slug, name)]. Builders that omit supplier_slug produce broken plugin interfaces.

title: Two plugins sharing BaseImportPlugin in one package
rationale: Coordinator requirement: separate plugin classes for Mouser and LCSC so each can have independent settings (API keys, supplier selectors). Shared BaseImportPlugin handles InvenTree ORM operations (import_part, import_manufacturer_part, import_supplier_part, get_pricing_data, get_parameters).

content: get_search_results and get_import_data on SupplierMixin plugins require supplier_slug as first param; get_suppliers returns list[dict] with name/description/website keys in standalone test environment

MRO conflict: plugins must NOT inherit from SettingsMixin when BaseImportPlugin already provides it via SupplierMixin chain. Use class XxxPlugin(BaseImportPlugin) only — SettingsMixin is inherited transitively.

conftest.py must stub both plugin and plugin.mixins in sys.modules. Register SettingsMixin/SupplierMixin on plugin.mixins so base.py's try/except succeeds and get_setting() is available via inheritance in tests.

Supplier and SearchResult must use InvenTree's own dataclasses from plugin.base.supplier.helpers (slug+name for Supplier; sku/name/exact/description/link/image_url for SearchResult). Add try/except ImportError fallback in base.py with matching dataclasses for test environments. Stub plugin.base.supplier.helpers in conftest.py.

_annotate_existing_parts() in BaseImportPlugin uses SupplierPart.objects.filter(supplier=self.supplier_company, SKU=result.sku).select_related('part').first() to set result.existing_part; guard on _INVENTREE_AVAILABLE ensures no-op outside InvenTree

conftest.py must also stub company and company.models with a _QuerySet stub returning None from .first() so _annotate_existing_parts works in tests when _INVENTREE_AVAILABLE=True. SupplierMixin stub needs supplier_company=None attribute.
